metadata.description: Batch 19 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1801-1900; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: used to express surprise or recognition
a thick liquid used as fuel, food, or lubricant
acceptable or used to show agreement
having existed for a long time
in contact with a surface or operating
words.definitionTh: บน / เปิดอยู่
ครั้งหนึ่ง

words.definitionEn: connected to or available through the internet
to a position on a surface
words.example: Move the box onto the table.

words.definitionEn: a hole, beginning, or available position
words.example: There is an opening in the cover.

words.definitionEn: to work or control a machine
words.example: Only trained staff may operate the machine.

words.definitionEn: the process of working or an organized activity
words.definitionTh: การดำเนินงาน
words.example: The line returned to normal operation.

words.definitionTh: ความคิดเห็น
words.example: In my opinion, the solution is practical.
This is an opportunity to improve.

words.definitionTh: ที่คัดค้าน
words.example: They are opposed to the proposal.
The switch is on the opposite side.

words.definitionTh: การคัดค้าน

words.example: Use a camera or a sensor.

words.definitionEn: a citrus fruit or its colour
words.definitionTh: ส้ม / สีส้ม

words.definitionEn: an instruction or arrangement; to request goods
words.definitionTh: คำสั่ง / สั่ง
words.example: Place the parts in the correct order.

words.definitionEn: a body part with a specific function

words.definitionTh: จัดระเบียบ
เป็นระเบียบ

words.definitionEn: a person who plans an event

words.example: We traced the origin of the defect.
The test was originally planned for Monday.

words.definitionEn: if not or in a different way
words.example: Wear gloves; otherwise, stop the task.

words.definitionEn: used to express duty or expectation
words.example: We ought to check the data.

words.definitionEn: used when we are subject and object

words.example: The sensor is not for outdoor use.

words.definitionEn: a summary or outer line; to summarize
words.example: The report outlines the next steps.

words.definitionEn: an enclosed appliance used for heating food
words.example: Heat the sample in the oven.

words.definitionTh: เหนือ / มากกว่า
words.example: The cable runs over the frame.

words.definitionEn: to need to pay or give something
to put things into a container; a group
a wrapped object or set of services
words.definitionTh: บรรจุภัณฑ์

words.definitionEn: one side of a sheet in a book or document

words.definitionTh: ความเจ็บปวด
words.example: He felt pain in his shoulder.

words.definitionEn: a painted picture or the activity of painting
words.example: The painting hangs in the hall.

words.definitionEn: a large official home of a ruler
words.example: The king lived in a palace.

words.definitionEn: a metal container used for cooking
words.example: Heat the oil in a pan.

words.definitionEn: a flat section or group of experts
thin material used for writing or packaging
a public green area; to leave a vehicle
the act or place of leaving a vehicle
a piece or section of a whole

words.definitionTh: ผู้เข้าร่วม
มีส่วนร่วม
words.example: Everyone can participate in the workshop.

words.definitionEn: a person or organization working with another
words.example: The supplier is a project partner.

words.definitionEn: a social event or political group
words.definitionTh: งานเลี้ยง / พรรค

words.definitionEn: to move beyond, succeed, or give; an act of passing
a section of text or a narrow route
words.definitionTh: ข้อความตอนหนึ่ง

words.definitionEn: a person travelling in a vehicle
a very strong interest or feeling
words.definitionTh: ความหลงใหล
words.example: She has a passion for engineering.

words.definitionEn: an official document for international travel
words.definitionTh: หนังสือเดินทาง
words.example: Check that your passport is valid.

words.definitionEn: earlier than now or beyond a point
words.definitionTh: อดีต / ผ่าน

words.definitionEn: a person receiving treatment; able to wait calmly
words.definitionTh: ผู้ป่วย / อดทน

words.definitionEn: a repeated design or regular way something happens
words.example: The data shows a clear pattern.

words.definitionEn: to give money; payment for work
words.example: The company will pay the fee.

words.definitionTh: การชำระเงิน

words.example: The area is quiet and peaceful.

words.definitionEn: a tool used for writing with ink

words.example: Draw the line with a pencil.

words.definitionEn: a small unit of British money
